/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/disk_manager_test.dir/test/disk_manager_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/disk_manager_test.dir/src/storage/DiskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/disk_manager_test.dir/src/storage/page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/disk_manager_test.dir/src/storage/BufferPool.cpp.o -o disk_manager_test
